active_profile_source: S00/S02 active profile, not a global KBS default
downstream_design_force: S13 can audit exact failed obligations

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: missing critical material or unsafe claim
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: thin section or missing citation/visual obligation
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: possible reviewer risk without forced rerun

nearest_responsible_stage_policy: S10 for ignored packet obligations; S09B or earlier if obligations were absent from the packet
anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR and WATCH do not force full downstream rerun by default
